name: Rest
content:
A Rest block creates a gap in your timeline
You can change how long the rest lasts. Each number on the top of the timeline is one measure.
You can also rest on the beat of a song instead of the measure. This lets you create shorter gaps between tracks
You can use rests strategically with `play sequential` to offset when a sound starts. This may make it line up better with the song being played
Key Takeaway: Rests add gaps to your timeline. Use them strategically with play sequential to line up your tracks and create special moments in songs.

palette_params.name: length
palette_params.description: The length of time to wait. A beat is one fourth of a measure.

short_description: Wait for a time before playing the next sample.
